name: Sour Cream Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup C&H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed)
1/2 cup C&H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cake mix, sugar, eggs, water, and 1/2 cup of sour cream in a mixing bowl.
2. Mix at low speed for 30 seconds.
3. Scrape the bowl and beat at medium speed for 1 to 2 minutes until smooth.
4. Pour into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch pan.
5. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 35 to 40 minutes, or until cake tests done.
6. Combine remaining sour cream with 1/2 cup of C&H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed).
7. Spread on hot cake and broil for 3 to 5 minutes.
8. Cool.
Comments: Moist cake and keeps well.
Reprinted with permission from Just Cakes.
From the C&H Sugar Kitchen.
